# Priority research queue

Start here. These are high-leverage because they control the earliest gates or the strongest downstream actions.

## Batch 1 — First-frame salience

Hypotheses:

```text
H007, H008, H011, H012, H091, H092, H093
```

Method:

```text
M-MPT / Comparatio gemina
```

Primary metric:

```text
CTV
```

## Batch 2 — Hook tension

Hypotheses:

```text
H015–H023, H094, H107–H109
```

Method:

```text
M-SVT / Variatio singularis
```

Primary metric:

```text
EHR
```

## Batch 3 — Text and captions

Hypotheses:

```text
H024–H034, H100–H106
```

Method:

```text
M-DOS / Dosis responsum
```

Primary metric:

```text
APV or CPL
```

## Batch 4 — Proof and trust

Hypotheses:

```text
H013, H061–H070, H121–H123, H142–H144
```

Method:

```text
M-MPT or M-ROB
```

Primary metric:

```text
SAV, FOL, TRU
```

## Batch 5 — Save/send/comment/follow actions

Hypotheses:

```text
H044–H060, H117–H129
```

Method:

```text
M-SVT
```

Primary metric:

```text
SAV, SND, CMT, FOL
```

## Batch 6 — Search vs feed

Hypotheses:

```text
H001–H006, H095–H096, H160–H162
```

Method:

```text
M-SGA / Assay quaesitionis
```

Primary metric:

```text
SEA
```
